title: cacalia briquetii
intro: Cacalia briquetii, also known as Yellowhead or Golden Ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and flowers have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cacalia briquetii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
